name: Matt Yu
headline: Merging Ops & Tech
summaries: Born and raised in NYC, I studied Finance before starting my career in insurance operations — a foundation that still shapes how I approach automation and AI.

I currently serve as General Manager (North America) for Blackbook.ai, where I’m responsible for building and scaling our Automation & AI capabilities across the region. My background spans claims operations, shared services, and enterprise automation, including roles as Head of Automation and Claims Operations Manager for AIG.

With my finance background and deep operations leadership experience — I design automation and AI solutions through a commercial, operational, and ROI‑driven lens. As a self‑taught automation engineer and architect, I’ve built bots, roadmaps, and enterprise strategies for 40+ organizations, ensuring technology investments translate into measurable business outcomes.
I've also had the unforgettable opportunity to live and work abroad in Australia, Malaysia and Brazil. After 8+ years abroad, I moved back home in 2021 and ultimately settled in Seattle!

skills.title: I Lead
skills.description: Operations transformation, target operating models, and change management — the business layer that makes automation stick long-term.

skills.title: I Build
skills.description: Self-taught automation architect across UiPath, Power Platform, and Azure — having designed and delivered for 40+ companies.

experience.tagline: Built and led a US RPA service delivery partnership, architecting 50+ enterprise automations across UiPath, Power Automate, and Automation Anywhere.
Designed and delivered intelligent automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform for enterprise clients across multiple industries.
Took time away from work to care for family while navigating international relocation during the COVID pandemic.
Developed and deployed UiPath RPA bots at 20+ major Australian companies spanning financial services, insurance, and more.
Launched AIG's RPA Center of Excellence between Kuala Lumpur and Manila, leading 14 analysts and delivering automation savings of 7+ FTEs.
Managed a 100+ FTE claims and contact center team across South Africa and the US, driving large-scale operational transformation.
Restored and improved service levels through successful backlog remediation plans.
Tracked and reported on a $300M global IT transformation program
Responsible for the launch planning for AIG's Brazil insurance operations.
Produced executive-level financial and operational reporting across AIG's global operations portfolio.

education.narrative: Most automation practitioners come from engineering. I came from Finance — which means I've always led with ROI, cost modeling, and operational efficiency. The automation and AI layer came later, but the business lens was there from day one.

items.name: Google Cloud Platform Fundamentals: Core Infrastructure

interests.title: Flavor Chaser
interests.description: The best part of living abroad? The flavors! From hawker centers in KL to food stalls in Japan and sidewalk eateries in Vietnam — satisfying the foodie in me, one bite at a time.

interests.title: Racket Sports
interests.description: Pickleball, badminton, and tennis — why pick one when you can play all three?

interests.title: Do This More
interests.description: A month diving the reefs of Thailand is something I'll always treasure. Skiing has that same magic — both are firmly on the 'do this more' list.

interests.title: Nintendo Switch
interests.description: A Yu family staple for Seattle's rainy days — couch co-op, shared victories, and the occasional friendly argument. Highly recommend.
